response.original_title: Can You Transfer Crypto to Another Crypto on Robinhood? Full Guide & Real Answer
response.overview: Robinhood does not support direct crypto-to-crypto transfers (swaps) within the platform (+1★(888)★576★2041) ✔️➤【1→888→576→2041】. Instead, users must sell one cryptocurrency and then use the funds to buy another ➤【1→888→576→2041】. Can I swap crypto directly on Robinhood?  No, direct swaps are not supported ✔️(+1★(888)★576★2041). How do I convert Bitcoin to Ethereum?  Sell Bitcoin → Buy Ethereum ✔️➤【1→888→576→2041】. Are there fees for converting crypto?  Indirect costs like spreads apply. Can I transfer crypto to another platform for swapping?  Yes, if transfers are enabled ✔️ (+1-888» 576» 2041). Will Robinhood add crypto swaps in future?  Possibly, but not confirmed.
